description: A document related to an Individual Retirement Account (IRA), including account details, contributions, and distributions.

account_holder_name.instruction: The full name of the individual who owns the IRA account.

account_number.instruction: The unique number assigned to the IRA account by the financial institution.

financial_institution.instruction: The name of the bank, broker, or financial institution that manages the IRA.

account_type.instruction: The type of IRA, such as Traditional IRA, Roth IRA, SEP IRA, or SIMPLE IRA.

contribution_dates.instruction: The dates on which contributions were made to the IRA.

distribution_dates.instruction: The dates on which distributions or withdrawals were made from the IRA, if any.

account_balance.instruction: The account balance as reported on the document.

tax_year.instruction: The tax year the document applies to, often printed on statements or Form 5498.
